title: Cloud Guard Problem: IAM User Console Password Old
description: Detects Cloud Guard reporting problem: IAM_User_Console_Password_Old.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Problems' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Logs') and (('Problem Name' = 'IAM_User_Console_Password_Old'))
